name: 06-30-fix-merge-worker-no-parent-worktree
title: fix: merge_worker fails with 'parent session has no worktree' on isolated sub-agent runs
description: P1 bug: UI merge button and LLM-driven merge_worker tool both fail when parent session has WorktreeState=None (no worktree attached), but a worker subagent with isolation=true created a worker/<run_id> branch. Root cause: db/sessions.rs:49-54 explicitly opts out of auto-creating worktree on session create, so the parent session has no session/<id> branch to merge INTO. Error surfaces at commands/subagent_runs.rs:153 (UI path) and tools/merge_worker.rs:287-290 (tool path). Fix needs to choose between (a) UX guard with explicit attach CTA, (b) lazy auto-attach on merge, or (c) auto-attach on dispatch of first isolated worker.
creator: Carlos-home
